hint.en: Set the interval for boiler values from the Sunberry. The 1F boiler reports total heater power and temperature when a sensor is connected.
Enter the IP address or hostname of your Sunberry device, for example sunberry.local
Used in the all-week boiler timer sent when the Boiler is turned on. If a temperature sensor is connected, Sunberry heats at 100% below this temperature.
Used in the all-week boiler timer sent when the Boiler is turned on. If a temperature sensor is connected, Sunberry turns off heating above this temperature.
When enabled, Sunberry tries to heat from available surplus PV power and respects battery discharge behavior. When disabled, the timer may also use grid energy.
The configured total heater power of the single-phase boiler in W. Sunberry uses this value for boiler regulation and percentage calculations.
Minimum surplus power kept outside boiler heating. For example, with a 300 W offset and 450 W surplus, Sunberry can route about 150 W to the boiler.
Physical phase used by the single-phase boiler. The app sends no_phases=1 and maps this phase to the selected digital output.
The digital output that switches the selected boiler phase. Other hidden phase output fields are sent as DO3 for the single-phase setup.
Enable or disable detailed debug logs for troubleshooting.
